title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 19–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Cracker, Big Mom as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Have you lost your friggin' mind?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You Willingly And In detail gave precious Intel to Our Enemies?! You Fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with that large head... we assumed he'd be a giant!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, cracker! At least let me see Chifon one last time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BIG MOM PIRATES one of the "3 sweet commanders" minister of biscuits

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that she got married... the least you can do is let me Congratu- late her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I also heard that Lola ran away... but she's also someone I still hold near and dear to my heart!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Please, let me speak to Linlin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That name rings a bell... wait ...it isn't ...!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 15 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
